---
title: "Exploratory FC+BO Grand Model"
subtitle: "BBB / BUB / BRB — item-level second-order model (Faircloth + Boenigk, n = 2,038)"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false
source(here::here("R", "00_paths.R"))
source(here::here("R", "01_packages.R"))
source(here::here("R", "12_lavaan_models.R"))
source(here::here("R", "11_fit_helpers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "20_fit_cfa.R"))
source(here::here("R", "10_datasets.R"))
stopifnot(exists("DATASETS"))

# FC and BO share the same qnr1 respondents (n = 2,038)
# Use DATASETS$fc which has all FC + BO items + TOM/SAW
dat <- DATASETS$fc
message("Dataset: n = ", nrow(dat), " | columns: ", ncol(dat))

# Item sets (from external_Sources.R / 01_lavaan_models.R)
items_fc_br <- c("FC01_01","FC01_02","FC01_03")
items_fc_bd <- c("FC01_04","FC01_05","FC01_06")
items_fc_bc <- c("FC02_01","FC02_02","FC02_03","FC02_04",
                  "FC02_05","FC02_06","FC02_07","FC02_08")
items_fc_bs <- c("FC02_09","FC02_10_rev","FC02_11","FC02_12_rev") # weak: AVE=.037
items_fc_bf <- c("FC03_01","FC03_02","FC03_03")
items_bo_tr <- c("B101_01","B101_02","B101_03")
items_bo_co <- c("B102_01","B102_02","B102_03")
items_bo_bf <- c("BC03_01","BC03_02","BC03_03")
items_aw    <- c("TOM","SAW")  # shared across FC_RC and BO_RC — used once

# Check availability
all_items <- c(items_fc_br, items_fc_bd, items_fc_bc, items_fc_bs,
               items_fc_bf, items_bo_tr, items_bo_co, items_bo_bf, items_aw)
missing <- setdiff(all_items, names(dat))
if (length(missing) > 0) message("Missing items: ", paste(missing, collapse=", "))
available <- intersect(all_items, names(dat))
message("Available items: ", length(available), "/", length(all_items))
```

# Stage 1 — EFA on raw items (FC + BO combined)

```{r}
#| label: efa-items
#| cache: true
efa_items <- intersect(c(items_fc_br, items_fc_bd, items_fc_bc,
                          items_fc_bf, items_bo_tr, items_bo_co,
                          items_bo_bf, items_aw), names(dat))
# Exclude FC_BS: AVE=.037, omega=.136 — collapses in every model
# Include only if you want to see the collapse empirically
efa_data <- dat[, efa_items, drop = FALSE]
efa_data <- efa_data[complete.cases(efa_data), ]
message("EFA: ", ncol(efa_data), " items, n = ", nrow(efa_data))

# Parallel analysis to choose number of factors
pa <- psych::fa.parallel(efa_data, fm = "ml", fa = "fa",
                          n.iter = 50, plot = FALSE)
n_fa <- max(2, pa$nfact)
message("Parallel analysis suggests ", n_fa, " factor(s)")

# EFA with oblique rotation
fa_res <- psych::fa(efa_data, nfactors = n_fa,
                    rotate = "oblimin", fm = "ml",
                    scores = "regression")
print(psych::fa.sort(fa_res), digits = 2, cut = 0.30)
```

# Stage 2 — First-order CFA (all FC + BO constructs)

```{r}
#| label: fo-cfa-syntax
# Shared awareness items used once (AW) to avoid dual-loading
# Build syntax programmatically from available items (safe — no string-replace)
make_factor <- function(name, items, data) {
  avail <- intersect(items, names(data))
  if (length(avail) < 2) return(NULL)
  paste0("  ", name, " =~ ", paste(avail, collapse = " + "))
}

fo_lines <- c(
  "  # FC constructs",
  make_factor("FC_BR", items_fc_br, dat),
  make_factor("FC_BD", items_fc_bd, dat),
  make_factor("FC_BC", items_fc_bc, dat),
  make_factor("FC_BF", items_fc_bf, dat),
  "  # BO constructs",
  make_factor("BO_TR", items_bo_tr, dat),
  make_factor("BO_CO", items_bo_co, dat),
  make_factor("BO_BF", items_bo_bf, dat)
)

# Awareness items: only add AW factor if >= 2 items available
aw_items <- intersect(items_aw, names(dat))
if (length(aw_items) >= 2) {
  fo_lines <- c(fo_lines,
    "  # Shared awareness",
    paste0("  AW =~ ", paste(aw_items, collapse = " + ")))
} else {
  message("AW factor skipped: only ", length(aw_items),
          " awareness items available (", paste(aw_items, collapse=","), ")")
}

fo_lines <- Filter(Negate(is.null), fo_lines)
fo_syntax_clean <- paste(fo_lines, collapse = "\n")
cat(fo_syntax_clean, "\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: fo-cfa-fit
#| cache: true
fit_fo <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(fo_syntax_clean, data = dat,
              estimator = "WLSMV",
              ordered   = intersect(available, names(dat)),
              std.lv    = TRUE),
  error = function(e) {
    message("WLSMV failed: ", e$message, " — trying MLR")
    lavaan::cfa(fo_syntax_clean, data = dat,
                estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml",
                std.lv = TRUE)
  })

if (lavaan::lavInspect(fit_fo, "converged")) {
  fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_fo,
          c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr"))
  message(sprintf("FO-CFA: CFI=%.3f TLI=%.3f RMSEA=%.3f SRMR=%.3f",
                  fm["cfi"],fm["tli"],fm["rmsea"],fm["srmr"]))

  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(fit_fo)
  std[std$op == "=~", c("lhs","rhs","est.std","pvalue")] |>
    dplyr::rename(factor=lhs, item=rhs, lambda=est.std, p=pvalue) |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(lambda,p), ~round(.x,3))) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header("First-order CFA — standardised loadings (FC + BO combined)")
} else {
  message("First-order CFA did not converge.")
}
```

# Stage 3 — BBB / BUB / BRB second-order CFA

```{r}
#| label: so-cfa-syntax
#| cache: false
# BBB — Brand Building Block:   recall, differentiation, familiarity, awareness
# BUB — Brand Usage Block:      associations (only FC_BC available without FC_BS)
# BRB — Brand Relationship Block: trust, commitment
#
# NOTE: BUB with only one first-order factor (FC_BC) is just-identified;
# we add FC_BD as a dual-member (awareness + usage) OR collapse BUB into BBB
# pending EFA results. Mark as exploratory.

so_syntax <- paste(
  fo_syntax_clean,
  "\n# Second-order blocks",
  # Build BBB dynamically from factors actually in the first-order model
  paste0("BBB =~ FC_BR + FC_BD + FC_BF",
         if (length(aw_items) >= 2) " + AW" else ""),
  "BUB =~ FC_BC",
  "BRB =~ BO_TR + BO_CO",
  "\n# Fix BUB residual (single indicator)",
  "FC_BC ~~ 0.10 * FC_BC",
  sep = "\n"
)

# Alternative: 2-block solution (if BUB too sparse)
so_syntax_2block <- paste(
  fo_syntax_clean,
  "\n# Two-block solution (BBB absorbs FC_BC)",
  paste0("BBB =~ FC_BR + FC_BD + FC_BF",
         if (length(aw_items) >= 2) " + AW" else "",
         " + FC_BC"),
  "BRB =~ BO_TR + BO_CO",
  sep = "\n"
)
cat("--- 3-block syntax ---\n", so_syntax, "\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: so-cfa-fit
#| cache: false
run_so <- function(syntax, label) {
  fit <- tryCatch(
    lavaan::cfa(syntax, data = dat, estimator = "MLR",
                missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
    error = function(e) { message(label, " failed: ", e$message); NULL })
  if (is.null(fit) || !lavaan::lavInspect(fit, "converged")) {
    message(label, ": did not converge"); return(NULL)
  }
  fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit, c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
  message(sprintf("%s: CFI=%.3f TLI=%.3f RMSEA=%.3f SRMR=%.3f AIC=%.0f",
                  label, fm["cfi"],fm["tli"],fm["rmsea"],fm["srmr"],fm["aic"]))
  fit
}

fit_3block <- run_so(so_syntax,        "3-block (BBB/BUB/BRB)")
fit_2block <- run_so(so_syntax_2block, "2-block (BBB/BRB)")

# Show loadings for best-fitting model
get_cfi <- function(fit) if (!is.null(fit) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit,"converged"))
  tryCatch(lavaan::fitMeasures(fit,"cfi"), error=function(e) -Inf) else -Inf
best_fit  <- if (get_cfi(fit_3block) >= get_cfi(fit_2block)) fit_3block else fit_2block
best_label <- if (identical(best_fit, fit_3block)) "3-block" else "2-block"
if (is.null(best_fit)) stop("Neither model converged.")

if (!is.null(best_fit)) {
  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(best_fit)
  std[std$op == "=~" & std$lhs %in% c("BBB","BUB","BRB"),
      c("lhs","rhs","est.std","pvalue")] |>
    dplyr::rename(Block=lhs, Factor=rhs, lambda=est.std, p=pvalue) |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(lambda,p), ~round(.x,3))) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header(paste("Second-order loadings —", best_label, "solution"))
}
```

# Stage 4 — Inter-block correlations and model comparison

```{r}
#| label: model-comparison
#| cache: false
# Include whichever models converged
fits <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(
  `3-block (BBB/BUB/BRB)` = fit_3block,
  `2-block (BBB+BRB)`     = fit_2block
))
if (length(fits) > 0) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(fits, function(fit, label) {
    fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit, c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
    tibble::tibble(
      Solution = label,
      CFI   = round(fm["cfi"],  3), TLI  = round(fm["tli"],  3),
      RMSEA = round(fm["rmsea"],3), SRMR = round(fm["srmr"], 3),
      AIC   = round(fm["aic"],  0), BIC  = round(fm["bic"],  0)
    )
  }) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header("Model comparison: 3-block vs 2-block solution",
                   subtitle = "Lower AIC/BIC = better; CFI/TLI > .90 = acceptable")
}
```

# Stage 5 — Grand brand equity (GBE), third order

```{r}
#| label: grand-be
#| eval: true
#| cache: false
# Activate once 3-block or 2-block converges cleanly
grand_syntax <- paste(so_syntax,
                      "\nGBE =~ BBB + BRB", sep = "\n")
fit_grand <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(grand_syntax, data = dat, estimator = "MLR",
              missing = "fiml", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(fit_grand) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_grand, "converged"))
  print(lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_grand, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")))
```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
